title: Create: Recipe Everything
description: This mod introduces a variety of new items and blocks specifically designed to enhance and expand the automation capabilities within the already existing Create mod.
body:
# New Blocks and Items Expansion for Create Mod

This mod introduces several new features to enhance the automation and crafting experience within the Create mod. Below is an overview of the additions:

## New Blocks
- **Gravel Wart** 
- ![Gravel Wart - Gravel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6517cde7bba01c5c95ac76f4bc7c793511777c41.png)
- **Cobble Wart** 
- ![Cobble Wart - Cobblestone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eabe7f596a8c7fbcc44e2e03463bc7e9267f35f.png)

## New Crops
- **Muscari Flower**: Not just a decorative flower, but also a new crop with its own uses.
- **Lily of the Valley**: Traditionally found in gardens, now available as a crop for cultivation.
![Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11450804c85142bd2cc5101bf3852fb874aac29d.png)

## New Items
- **Coal Dust**: A new resource obtained from coal, used in various new recipes.
- **Graphite**: A derivative of coal, used in advanced crafting.
- **Lily of the Valley Seed**: Plantable seeds for growing your own Lily of the Valley crops.
- **Muscari Seed**: Seeds for cultivating the Muscari flowers.
- **Diamond Fragment**: A new item obtained from breaking down less valuable materials, used in crafting diamonds themselves. This provides a new method for players to obtain diamonds, adding depth to resource management and crafting strategies.

## Config
Enable/ Disable all new recipes in the config file (
```
%USERPROFILE%\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\config\createrecipeeverything-common.toml
```
)

## New Recipes
Several new recipes have been added to provide more depth to the game's crafting system. These recipes allow for the creation of new items and block types, further enhancing the mod's integration with the Create mod's automation features.
